mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_IN_OUT_REL ( ID, WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL_ID, WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL_ID, QUANTITY, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{warehouseInDetailId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{warehouseOutDetailId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{quantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

INSERT INTO E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_IN_OUT_REL ( ID, WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL_ID, WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL_ID, QUANTITY, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )
SELECT #{item.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.warehouseInDetailId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.warehouseOutDetailId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.quantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT ID, WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL_ID, WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL_ID, QUANTITY, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_IN_OUT_REL WHERE WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL_ID = #{warehouseOutDetailId} ORDER BY CREATE_TIME ASC
